title: Clean deprecated terms from docs SKILLS.md (en+ko)
goal: Remove onboard references, conventions.md references, and Absorption Reference table from docs/reference/SKILLS.md and docs/ko/reference/SKILLS.md
acceptance_criteria: No occurrences of onboard (as skill name) in docs/reference/SKILLS.md
No occurrences of onboard (as skill name) in docs/ko/reference/SKILLS.md
No occurrences of conventions.md in either SKILLS.md file
Absorption Reference section fully removed from both files
